title: FPV_Drone Fantom
description: This resource pack replaces the phantom model with the FPV Drone model, and also adds new sounds.
body:
# **Optifine or EMF required**
The resource pack uses a custom model and animations.

For Fabric
- EMF https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features
- ETF https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures
  
For Forge
- Optifine https://optifine.net/downloads

# **Preview**
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76cce3cde27e1ef5d47e2fa394255edf31bf1296_0.webp)
